name: WaterChemistryValidationReport
label: Water chemistry validation report
description: Generates a validation report for ICP-Forest water chemistry samples from the validated CSV files produced by the WaterChemistryValidation wrapper. Produces a multi-page PDF with key indicators, five summary charts and a colour-coded per-sample validation table; an Excel file with only the samples that failed validation (Samples2Repeat); and an Excel file with all samples regardless of outcome (allFinalData). Both Excel files highlight missing values in red.

inputs.name: input-data
inputs.label: Validated data ZIP
inputs.description: ZIP archive containing the validated tab-separated CSV files (one per SiteCode) produced by the WaterChemistryValidation wrapper. Each CSV must include the FINAL_VALIDATION column and the quality indicator columns.

inputs.name: input-samples
inputs.label: Samples typology file
inputs.description: Excel file mapping each SampleID to its SamplingTypology (e.g. THR CON, BOF BL, SW CON). Used to fill typology for REP samples and to define the sample sort order in the report tables. Required columns: SampleID, SamplingTypology.

outputs.name: output-pdf
outputs.label: Validation report PDF
outputs.description: Multi-page PDF report containing: key indicators summary, five validation charts (failed validations by month, failure type breakdown, monthly failure rate, outcome by non-repeated sample, outcome by repeated sample) and a colour-coded detailed validation table per sample.

outputs.name: output-repeat
outputs.label: Samples to repeat (Excel)
outputs.description: Excel file containing only the samples that failed validation (FINAL_VALIDATION = NO), sorted by year, month and SampleID. Empty cells are highlighted in red.

outputs.name: output-all
outputs.label: All final data (Excel)
outputs.description: Excel file containing all samples regardless of validation outcome, with the same column layout and red highlighting for missing values.

author: LifeWatch ERIC
